Site.title: Auto Diaspora — Trusted European cars marketplace
Site.description: Marketplace of verified European cars for the diaspora. Find a seller in your country in your language. BMW, Audi, Mercedes, VW, Skoda across Germany, Poland, the Netherlands, Czechia, Belgium.

Hero.headline: Cars across Europe.
Hero.tagline: A marketplace for the diaspora across the EU. Find a seller near you — talk directly, no middlemen, no language barrier.

About.title: A trusted-cars marketplace for the diaspora
About.subtitle: Auto Diaspora is where the diaspora across the EU finds cars in their own language — no middlemen, no resellers, no opaque fees.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: We build an honest marketplace for European cars aimed at the diaspora. Direct seller-to-buyer chats in your own language, transparent prices in €, verified listings, free access, paid upgrades only for sellers who want extra reach.

items.verified: Verified sellers earn a badge after manual vetting — less risk of running into a scammer.
items.noFees: €0 buyer fee. Only sellers pay, and only if they want premium placement.
items.languages: Three languages (UK / RU / EN) — communicate the way you and your counterpart prefer.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Four steps from first search to deal closed. No middlemen, no hidden fees.

search.title: Find a car
search.body: Browse the catalog with filters for brand, model, year, price, mileage, country, fuel, transmission. Save searches — get notified about fresh matches.

contact.title: Contact the seller
contact.body: Use the in-platform real-time chat or call (phone unlocked after login). No middlemen — communication is direct between you and the seller.

verify.title: Verify the car
verify.body: Browse all photos, read the description, ask for extra angles. Arrange a test drive or bring a mechanic. VIN check arrives post-MVP.

buy.title: Buy
buy.body: The deal happens between you and the seller. We don't take a cut from the buyer. Paperwork, inspection and handover are arranged directly, in the EU country where the car is located.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of Auto Diaspora (the “Platform”), operated by Oleksandr Fomenko, an eenmanszaak registered in the Netherlands (KVK 97036277). By creating an account or browsing the Platform you accept these Terms in full.
Terms.operatorNote: Auto Diaspora is operated under Dutch law. The English version is authoritative; localized translations are provided for convenience.

account.title: Account
account.body: One person — one account. You must be at least 18 years old to register, since car-purchase contracts require legal capacity. You agree to provide truthful contact information (email, optionally phone) and to keep your credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity that originates from your account. Sharing an account with third parties is grounds for suspension.

listings.title: Listings
listings.body: By posting a listing you confirm that (a) you are the legal owner of the vehicle or have a written mandate to sell it, (b) the VIN matches the actual vehicle and its papers, (c) the photos are of the vehicle being sold (no stock images), (d) the description honestly reflects mileage, condition, accident history, and customs status. The first three (3) active listings per account are free; further listings require a paid upgrade. We pre-moderate all submissions and may reject any listing without a specific reason.

premium.title: Premium services & payments
premium.body: Paid services — Bump (€4.99), Premium 14 days (€9.99), Premium 30 days (€19.99), Extra listing (€2.99), Verified seller (€15) — are processed through Mollie B.V., a payment service provider licensed by De Nederlandsche Bank. Prices include applicable VAT. You explicitly consent to immediate digital delivery of paid services upon payment, which means you waive your 14-day withdrawal right under Dutch consumer law (Burgerlijk Wetboek 6:230o lid 1 sub a) once the service is activated. Refunds are issued only when a service was not delivered due to a technical failure on our side.

transactions.title: Sales between users
transactions.body: The Platform is a venue: we are not a party to any sale. Buyer and seller arrange payment, vehicle inspection, paperwork transfer, and shipping directly between themselves. We do not hold escrow, do not verify VIN against national registries, and do not guarantee the accuracy of any listing. You are encouraged to meet in person, inspect the vehicle, and only transfer funds after the kentekenbewijs (or equivalent) is signed over.

prohibited.title: Prohibited content
prohibited.body: The following will be removed and the responsible account banned: stolen vehicles or vehicles without a clear title; vehicles with falsified VIN or tampered odometer; vehicles missing legal documents; adult, drug, weapon or hate-related content; multi-account spam; listings whose primary purpose is to redirect users off-platform (links to Telegram channels, external marketplaces, crypto pitches).

termination.title: Account termination
termination.body: We may suspend an account without prior warning in case of fraud, spam, harassment, repeated user complaints, or violation of these Terms. You may delete your account at any time via Settings → Delete account. After deletion, personal data is erased within 30 days, except records we are legally required to retain (payment receipts under Dutch tax law — 7 years).

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: The Platform is provided “as is”. We make no warranty of uninterrupted operation, fitness for a particular purpose, or freedom from errors. Our total liability for any claim arising out of these Terms is capped at the amount the user paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim (which, for free users, is €0). We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages, nor for failures of third-party services (Supabase, Vercel, Mollie, Resend, Telegram).

disputes.title: Governing law & disputes
disputes.body: These Terms are governed by Dutch law. Disputes will be heard by the District Court of Amsterdam. Consumers residing in the EU may also use the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution platform at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

changes.title: Changes to these Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms. Material changes will be announced by email to all registered users at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Policy explains what personal data Auto Diaspora collects, why, and what you can do about it. It complies with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, Regulation 2016/679) and the Dutch UAVG.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: Oleksandr Fomenko, operating as Auto Diaspora — eenmanszaak registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce, KVK 97036277, Dorpsstraat 16, 4641HW Ossendrecht, Netherlands. Privacy contact: autodiasporahelp@gmail.com.

collected.title: Data we collect
collected.body: Account data: email, hashed password (Supabase Auth), display name, optionally phone, country, city, language. Listing data: brand, model, VIN, photos, price, location, contact details you chose to include. Communication: messages exchanged through in-app chat. Technical: IP address, browser user-agent, referrer, server logs. Payment data: Mollie payment id, amount, currency, status — we never see your card number.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis & purposes
legalBasis.body: Performance of contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — to run authentication, listings, chat, payments. Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) — fraud prevention, abuse detection, anonymous service analytics. Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) — optional cookies beyond the essentials, optional Telegram or email notifications. Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)) — retaining payment records for 7 years per Dutch tax law (Algemene wet inzake rijksbelastingen art. 52).

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Account data is retained while the account is active and 30 days after deletion, then erased. Active listings: until removed by the seller, sold, or 60 days past expiry. Chat messages: 2 years from the last message in a thread. Payment receipts: 7 years (Dutch tax law). Server logs with IP: 90 days. Analytics is anonymized at ingestion.

processors.title: Processors (who else sees your data)
processors.body: We do not sell your data. We share strictly what each processor needs to deliver their part of the service: Supabase Inc. (database + storage + auth, EU-Frankfurt region, GDPR DPA signed). Vercel Inc. (hosting; USA, Standard Contractual Clauses). Mollie B.V. (payments, the Netherlands). Resend Inc. (transactional email; USA, Standard Contractual Clauses). Telegram Messenger Inc. (only the chat id you provide for admin notifications; USA + UK).

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: Vercel and Resend are US-based. We rely on Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs, 2021/914/EU) for those transfers. Database, storage, and auth all live in the EU (Supabase Frankfurt). You can request a copy of the SCCs via autodiasporahelp@gmail.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: Essential cookies only: a session token from Supabase Auth, a CSRF token for Server Actions, the cookie that remembers you accepted this banner, and your preferred locale. No marketing or third-party tracking cookies. If we enable analytics later it will be a cookie-less, IP-anonymised provider (Plausible).

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Right to access (Art. 15) — “Download my data” in Settings exports a JSON dump. Rectification (Art. 16) — edit your profile in Settings. Erasure (Art. 17) — “Delete account” in Settings. Restriction (Art. 18), portability (Art. 20), objection (Art. 21) — write to autodiasporahelp@gmail.com; we respond within 30 days. We do not perform automated decision-making (Art. 22): listing moderation is reviewed by a human.

complaints.title: Complaints
complaints.body: If you believe we mishandled your data, you may lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens), Postbus 93374, 2509 AJ Den Haag, https://autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl, or with the supervisory authority in your country of residence.

children.title: Children
children.body: Auto Diaspora is not directed at children under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you discover that a minor has registered, write to autodiasporahelp@gmail.com and we will delete the account.

Impressum.title: Impressum
Impressum.intro: Information about the operator of this website, in compliance with Dutch civil-code disclosure requirements and Article 5(1) of the EU E-Commerce Directive (Directive 2000/31/EC).

operator.title: Operator
operator.name: Operator
operator.nameValue: Oleksandr Fomenko, operating as Auto Diaspora

dispute.title: Online dispute resolution
dispute.body: Under EU Regulation 524/2013 the European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are willing but not legally obliged to participate in an out-of-court dispute resolution procedure before a consumer arbitration body.

liability.title: Liability for content
liability.body: Listings are user-generated content. We act as a hosting provider under Article 14 of Directive 2000/31/EC: once we become aware of unlawful content (via report or otherwise) we remove or disable access expeditiously. Reports may be filed via the in-app “Report listing” button or by email.

errors.no_chat: You can only review sellers you've messaged.

Footer.tagline: Marketplace of verified cars across 14 EU countries for the diaspora. No language barrier.

Pricing.title: Simple and transparent
Pricing.subtitle: Listing is free. To get more visibility, pick one of three paid options: a single TOP boost for €5, or Premium for 14 / 30 days with a PREMIUM badge and auto-pin.

features.listing: List a car with no expiration
features.photos: Up to 12 photos and a detailed description

features.duration: Stays on top until someone else buys TOP
features.visibility: 5-8× more views in the first 48 hours

features.autoPin14: Automatically at the top for 14 days
features.boostViews: Typically 3-4× more views over the period

features.autoPin30: Automatically at the top for 30 days
features.boostViews: Best ROI when a car takes longer than a week to sell

howTop.q: What's the difference between TOP and Premium?
howTop.a: TOP is a one-shot boost that stays on top until someone else buys TOP later. Premium gives a PREMIUM badge on the card and automatically keeps your listing at the top for the entire paid period (14 or 30 days).

howPremium.a: Once premium_until is reached, the listing returns to the regular ranking — the badge is dropped and the top-of-catalog spot is lost. You can renew at any time.

stack.q: Can I buy TOP on top of an active Premium?
stack.a: Technically yes, but it's redundant — Premium already keeps you pinned. TOP would just refresh the ranking timestamp.

noBuyerFee.a: No. Zero buyer fee. Only sellers pay, and only when they want promotion.

vat.a: Yes — listed prices are final. Payments are processed via Mollie, a licensed PSP in the EU.

ForDealers.title: A dedicated channel for dealers
ForDealers.subtitle: Auto Diaspora reaches buyers across 14 EU countries who look for cars without a language barrier. If you run a dealership or resell privately, these are your buyers.

audience.title: Targeted audience
audience.body: The diaspora in Germany, Poland, the Netherlands, Czechia, Belgium, France and other EU countries. All looking for cars in their own language.

fees.title: No subscriptions
fees.body: You only pay for TOP — €5 per listing. No monthly plans, no cap on the number of active listings.

language.title: Multilingual interface
language.body: One listing, three languages (uk/ru/en). No duplicating cards or translating manually.

tools.title: Sales tools
tools.body: Built-in chat, view/favorites analytics, spam moderation, seller verification (in progress).

pricing.title: Same pricing as private sellers
pricing.body: We don't run separate dealer plans yet. Listings are free, TOP is €5 per ad. If you have 50+ active cars and need bulk pricing, reach out — we'll work something out.

register.title: Sign up
register.body: Create an account via email or sign in with Google / Telegram.

verify.title: Fill in your profile
verify.body: Business name, contacts, location. We add the Verified badge manually after review.

publish.title: Post your first car
publish.body: Brand, model, year, photos and description. Moderation: up to an hour during business hours.

manage.title: Manage from your dashboard
manage.body: Edit, pause, mark sold, analytics and chats — all under /account.

cta.title: Need bulk terms?
cta.body: Write to us if you run a dealership, list 20+ cars, or have specific requirements. We're open to integrations and partnerships.

Help.title: Support center
Help.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions. If you can't find what you need, email autodiasporahelp@gmail.com — we reply within one business day.

register.a: Email + confirmation, or via Google / Telegram. One account per person.

password.q: I forgot my password — what now?
password.a: On /auth/login click "Forgot password". We'll email you a reset link.

delete.q: How do I delete my account?
delete.a: /account/settings → "Danger zone" → "Delete account". This is permanent: listings, chats, favorites and credentials are wiped.

howPublish.q: How do I post a listing?
howPublish.a: Click "Post" in the header → fill out the 4-section form (brand/photos/details/contact). After submit it enters moderation (up to 1 hour in business hours).

moderation.q: Why is my listing under review?
moderation.a: All new listings go through manual moderation against spam and fraud. Up to 1 hour during business hours, up to 12 hours overnight and on weekends.

edit.q: Can I edit a published listing?
edit.a: Yes. /account/listings → click the listing → "Edit". Significant changes (price, photos) re-enter moderation; minor tweaks publish immediately.

limits.q: Is there a limit on active listings?
limits.a: The first 3 are free as an anti-spam measure. Need more — contact support and we'll raise the cap manually.

howTop.a: In /account/listings click "Boost" next to a listing → pay via Mollie (card, iDEAL, Bancontact, etc.) → activation is automatic.

refund.q: Can I get a refund for TOP?
refund.a: Only in case of a technical failure on our side. The digital service activates immediately, so the 14-day withdrawal right doesn't apply (Burgerlijk Wetboek 6:230o).

vat.a: €5 is the final price, VAT included. Mollie sends a receipt to the email tied to the payment.

meetup.q: Where should I meet the seller?
meetup.a: Public places only: service shop, police station, mall parking lot. Don't hand over money before signing paperwork.

documents.a: Kentekenbewijs (NL), Fahrzeugschein/Fahrzeugbrief (DE), equivalents in other countries. Cross-check VIN on the car, in the paperwork, and on the listing.

scam.q: I suspect a scam — what should I do?
scam.a: On the listing card click "Report" → pick a reason. We review within 24 hours. For urgent cases write to autodiasporahelp@gmail.com.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
contact.body: Email us — we reply within one business day (Europe/Amsterdam).
